gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (154/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (154/ 8)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ شُكْرُ كُلِّ نِعْمَةٍ وَ إِنْ عَظُمَتْ أَنْ تَحْمَدَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَيْهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ali Bin Uyayna, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> saying: ‘Gratefulness for each Bounty, and even if it is great is that you Praise Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic upon it’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Ali ibn ‘Uyayna from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Expressing one’s thankfulness for any favor, no matter how great it may be, is to thank Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, for it.’”
